creator: lukas.slebodnik@intrak.sk
text:
(In reply to Karli Sjöberg from comment #6)
configuration files looks good to me. But I need to see sssd log files.
Could you provide them?

BTW I assume you built sssd from ports wit enabled samba. Otherwise ad provider will not be built.

Another issue can be cause that openldap libraries are not build with sasl support (openldap-sasl-client).

It is impossible to say without sssd log files. This is a reason why I recommended to follow troubleshooting wiki.
